originalTitle: PufferLib - Where do we take RL from here?
title: Investigating Sample Reuse and World Models for Efficient RL
summary: Explored sample reuse and world model approaches to bridge the compute-efficiency gap in reinforcement learning. Debugged a Dreamer-based implementation, tested a small replay buffer for on-policy data, and ran experiments on Pong and Breakout, achieving near-solve performance on Pong but instability on Breakout.
